detaileddescription.para: These attributes extend the standard sensor_attribute enum to support ADXL355-specific configuration options.

briefdescription.para: High-pass filter corner at 24.7e-4 times ODR.
High-pass filter corner at 6.208e-4 times ODR.
High-pass filter corner at 1.5545e-4 times ODR.
High-pass filter corner at 0.3862e-4 times ODR.
High-pass filter corner at 0.0954e-4 times ODR.
High-pass filter corner at 0.0238e-4 times ODR.
ADXL355 High Pass Filter corner frequency options.

detaileddescription.para: These options correspond to the DT binding values for HPF corner settings.

briefdescription.para: Header file for extended sensor API of ADXL355 sensor.
